'''鈭歭-sh-zh''' ('''lashazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yandy|yandy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yandy|yandy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-sh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| lashazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashazhithi|lashazhithi]] || [[word:lashazhiji|lashazhiji]] || [[word:lashazhishi|lashazhishi]] || [[word:lashazhi|lashazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashazhuthuth|lashazhuthuth]] || [[word:lashazhujuj|lashazhujuj]] || [[word:lashazhushush|lashazhushush]] || [[word:lashazh|lashazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashazhuthu|lashazhuthu]] || [[word:lashazhuju|lashazhuju]] || [[word:lashazhushu|lashazhushu]] || [[word:lashazhu|lashazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashazhufuth|lashazhufuth]] || [[word:lashazhufuj|lashazhufuj]] || [[word:lashazhufush|lashazhufush]] || [[word:lashazhuf|lashazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashazhethe|lashazhethe]] || [[word:lashazheje|lashazheje]] || [[word:lashazheshe|lashazheshe]] || [[word:lashazhe|lashazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashazhothoth|lashazhothoth]] || [[word:lashazhojoj|lashazhojoj]] || [[word:lashazhoshosh|lashazhoshosh]] || [[word:lashazh|lashazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashazhotho|lashazhotho]] || [[word:lashazhojo|lashazhojo]] || [[word:lashazhosho|lashazhosho]] || [[word:lashazho|lashazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashazhofoth|lashazhofoth]] || [[word:lashazhofoj|lashazhofoj]] || [[word:lashazhofosh|lashazhofosh]] || [[word:lashazhof|lashazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashazh忙th忙|lashazh忙th忙]] || [[word:lashazh忙j忙|lashazh忙j忙]] || [[word:lashazh忙sh忙|lashazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:lashazh忙|lashazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashazhathath|lashazhathath]] || [[word:lashazhajaj|lashazhajaj]] || [[word:lashazhashash|lashazhashash]] || [[word:lashazh|lashazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashazhatha|lashazhatha]] || [[word:lashazhaja|lashazhaja]] || [[word:lashazhasha|lashazhasha]] || [[word:lashazha|lashazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashazhafath|lashazhafath]] || [[word:lashazhafaj|lashazhafaj]] || [[word:lashazhafash|lashazhafash]] || [[word:lashazhaf|lashazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lashazhasha|lashazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golashazhasha|golashazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilashazhasha|gokilashazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lashazhn眉sha|lashazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golashazhnkn眉sha|golashazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilashazhn眉sha|gokilashazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lashazhsh毛sha|lashazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golashazhnksh毛sha|golashazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilashazhsh毛sha|gokilashazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashazhrosha|lashazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashazhnkrosha|golashazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashazhrosha|gokilashazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lashazhmusha|lashazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golashazhnkmusha|golashazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashazhmusha|gokilashazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lashazhsherasha|lashazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golashazhnksherasha|golashazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilashazhsherasha|gokilashazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lashazhngasha|lashazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golashazhnkngasha|golashazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilashazhngasha|gokilashazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lashazhyasha|lashazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golashazhnkyasha|golashazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilashazhyasha|gokilashazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lashazhyamasha|lashazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golashazhnkyamasha|golashazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilashazhyamasha|gokilashazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lashazhn眉sh毛sha|lashazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golashazhnkn眉sh毛sha|golashazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilashazhn眉sh毛sha|gokilashazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashazhn眉rosha|lashazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashazhnkn眉rosha|golashazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashazhn眉rosha|gokilashazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashazhn眉musha|lashazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashazhnkn眉musha|golashazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashazhn眉musha|gokilashazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lashazhsh毛n眉sha|lashazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golashazhnksh毛n眉sha|golashazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilashazhsh毛n眉sha|gokilashazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashazhsh毛rosha|lashazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashazhnksh毛rosha|golashazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashazhsh毛rosha|gokilashazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashazhsh毛musha|lashazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashazhnksh毛musha|golashazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashazhsh毛musha|gokilashazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lashazhron眉sha|lashazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golashazhnkron眉sha|golashazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilashazhron眉sha|gokilashazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lashazhrosh毛sha|lashazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golashazhnkrosh毛sha|golashazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilashazhrosh毛sha|gokilashazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashazhromusha|lashazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashazhnkromusha|golashazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashazhromusha|gokilashazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lashazhmun眉sha|lashazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golashazhnkmun眉sha|golashazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilashazhmun眉sha|gokilashazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lashazhmush毛sha|lashazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golashazhnkmush毛sha|golashazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilashazhmush毛sha|gokilashazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashazhmurosha|lashazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashazhnkmurosha|golashazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashazhmurosha|gokilashazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lashazh|lashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:l忙sh忙zh|l忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holashazh|holashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hol忙sh忙zh|hol忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholashazh|hoholashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohol忙sh忙zh|hohol忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉lashazh|n眉lashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉l忙sh忙zh|n眉l忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉lashazh|n眉n眉lashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉l忙sh忙zh|n眉n眉l忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂lashazh|n茂lashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂l忙sh忙zh|n茂l忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂lashazh|n茂n茂lashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂l忙sh忙zh|n茂n茂l忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulashazh|lulashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lul忙sh忙zh|lul忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululashazh|lululashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulul忙sh忙zh|lulul忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilashazh|lilashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lil忙sh忙zh|lil忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililashazh|lililashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilil忙sh忙zh|lilil忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolashazh|kolashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kol忙sh忙zh|kol忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolashazh|kokolashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokol忙sh忙zh|kokol忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelashazh|kelashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kel忙sh忙zh|kel忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelashazh|kekelashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekel忙sh忙zh|kekel忙sh忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
